title.en: England fans' behaviour 'excellent' at World Cup
title.zh-CN: 英格兰球迷在世界杯上的表现“非常出色”

summary.en: England supporters in the United States are praised for their "excellent" behaviour during the group stage of the World Cup, but domestic incidents are up on recent tournaments.
summary.zh-CN: 在世界杯小组赛阶段，美国的英格兰球迷因其“出色”的表现而受到称赞，但最近的比赛中出现了国内事件。

title.en: Germany beaten on penalties as Paraguay reach last 16
title.zh-CN: 随着巴拉圭队进入16强，德国队在点球大战中被击败

summary.en: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup, losing to Paraguay 4-3 on penalties, following a 1-1 draw after extra time.
summary.zh-CN: 四次获胜的德国队在2026年世界杯上被淘汰出局，在加时赛后以1-1平局输给巴拉圭队，罚球4-3。

title.en: Netherlands crumble in penalty shootout as Morocco progress
title.zh-CN: 随着摩洛哥的进步，荷兰在点球大战中崩溃

summary.en: Netherlands miss three spot kicks as Morocco come from behind to beat the Dutch on penalties in Monterrey to reach the last 16 of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 荷兰错过了三场比赛，摩洛哥队在蒙特雷击败荷兰队，进入2026年世界杯的最后16场比赛。

title.en: 'Germany play one way - and it doesn't work any more'
title.zh-CN: “德国以一种方式发挥作用-它不再起作用”

summary.en: The team in the studio talk about what went wrong for Germany as they go out of the World Cup to Paraguay
summary.zh-CN: 工作室的团队谈论德国队在世界杯结束后前往巴拉圭时出了什么问题

title.en: Bigger than Rumble in the Jungle? DR Congo bid for World Cup history
title.zh-CN: 比丛林中的隆隆声还要大？刚果民主共和国申办世界杯历史

summary.en: DR Congo's run at the 2026 World Cup comes 52 years on from both their disastrous debut at the finals and one of sport's greatest occasions held in Kinshasa.
summary.zh-CN: 刚果民主共和国参加2026年世界杯，距离他们在决赛中灾难性的首次亮相和在金沙萨举行的体育盛会之一已经过去了52年。

title.en: Pick Mainoo over Anderson against DR Congo - Rooney
title.zh-CN: 将Mainoo带到安德森对阵刚果民主共和国-鲁尼

summary.en: Former England captain Wayne Rooney says he would start Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo instead of Elliot Anderson in Wednesday's World Cup last-32 tie with DR Congo.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）表示，他将在周三的世界杯上与刚果民主共和国的比赛中首发曼联中场球员科比·梅努（ Kobbie Mainoo ） ，而不是埃利奥特·安德森（ Elliot And

title.en: AC Milan sign PSG's Portugal striker Ramos for £60m
title.zh-CN: AC米兰以6000万英镑签下巴黎圣日耳曼队的葡萄牙前锋拉莫斯

summary.en: AC Milan sign Paris St-Germain striker Goncalo Ramos for a reported club record transfer fee of about £60m.
summary.zh-CN: AC米兰签下巴黎圣日耳曼前锋贡萨洛·拉莫斯（ Goncalo Ramos ） ，据报俱乐部纪录转会费约为6000万英镑

title.en: Canale scores winning penalty after Tah blazes over as Germany knocked out
title.zh-CN: Canale在德国淘汰赛中Tah失利后得分

summary.en: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup on penalties as Jonathan Tah blazes over in sudden death before Jose Canale scores the winning penalty.
summary.zh-CN: 四次获胜的德国队在2026年世界杯上被罚下场，因为乔纳森·塔（ Jonathan Tah ）在何塞·卡纳莱（ Jose Canale ）得分之前突然死亡。

title.en: 'Germany no longer first-class team ' - is this the end for Nagelsmann?
title.zh-CN: “德国不再是一流的球队” --这是Nagelsmann的终结吗？

summary.en: Germany make a shock last-32 exit against Paraguay, losing a World Cup penalty shootout for the first time to pile pressure on boss Julian Nagelsmann.
summary.zh-CN: 德国队在最后32场对阵巴拉圭队的比赛中表现出色，首次输掉了世界杯点球大战，给老板朱利安·纳格尔斯曼（ Julian Nagelsmann ）施加了压力。

title.en: 'A joke' - how a 'terrible' VAR disallowed goal cost Germany
title.zh-CN: “一个笑话” -一个“可怕的” VAR不允许的目标如何使德国付出代价

summary.en: Alan Shearer, Jurgen Klopp, Pat Nevin and Darren Cann feel Germany were hard done by as a VAR call rules out a potential winning goal before they lose on penalties to Paraguay.
summary.zh-CN: Alan Shearer、Jurgen Klopp、Pat Nevin和Darren Cann认为德国队做得很艰难，因为VAR通话在他们输给巴拉圭队之前排除了一个潜在的胜利目标。

title.en: Who has been eliminated from the World Cup?

summary.en: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team lists the full set of nations who have been eliminated from the 2026 World Cup so far
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport的Ask Me Anything团队列出了迄今为止被2026年世界杯淘汰的全部国家

title.en: Rangers buy Hull goalkeeper Pandur - what will he bring?
title.zh-CN: 流浪者购买船体守门员Pandur -他会带来什么？

summary.en: Rangers sign Croatian goalkeeper Ivor Pandur from Hull City for an undisclosed fee - what will he bring to Ibrox?
summary.zh-CN: 流浪者从赫尔城签下克罗地亚守门员Ivor Pandur ，收取未公开的费用-他将带给Ibrox什么？

title.en: Who starts at RB and how to beat low block? England vs DR Congo talking points

summary.en: If you're looking for a dark horse in the knockout stages, don't look for one in DR Congo. Look for a Leopard - patient, relentless, and ready to pounce when it matters most.
